problemStatement: Cross-border B2B payments take 3-5 days and cost 3-7% in fees, creating massive working capital inefficiencies for SMEs trading internationally. Traditional SWIFT rails are outdated and inaccessible to smaller businesses.
solutionOverview: NeuralPay uses AI-powered FX optimization and stablecoin settlement rails to deliver instant cross-border B2B payments at 0.3% fees. Our ML model predicts optimal routing across 12 settlement networks in real time.
coreProduct: AI-powered B2B cross-border payments platform with instant settlement
usp: 10x cheaper and 100x faster than traditional SWIFT wires, with ML-optimized routing across stablecoin and traditional rails
customerSegment: SMEs with international suppliers or customers, primarily in the $1M–$50M revenue range
competitiveAdvantage: ML routing achieves 40% better FX rates than competitors; stablecoin settlement enables instant finality vs 2-3 day holds
achievements: YC W25 backed, $42K MRR in 8 months, 0 churn in first 100 customers
useOfFundsDetail: 40% engineering (3 senior hires), 35% sales & marketing, 25% compliance & licensing
founderEducation: Aisha: MIT CS + MBA Wharton. Rohan: IIT Bombay CS, Stanford MS AI.
founderExperience: Aisha: 6 years at Square (led payments infrastructure), 2 years at Stripe. Rohan: 4 years at Google Pay India, built UPI integrations serving 50M users.
advisors: Patrick Collison (Stripe), Balaji Srinivasan (a16z crypto), ex-SWIFT CTO
whyFSV: FSV Capital's deep fintech portfolio and regulatory navigation expertise is exactly what NeuralPay needs to crack the compliance challenge in new markets. We specifically want FSV's connections in the Middle East corridor, which is our next expansion. No other VC we've spoken with has that specific edge.
fsvValueAdd: Regulatory introductions in UAE and Singapore, portfolio connections for enterprise pilots

problemStatement: Post-quantum cryptographic attacks will render RSA and ECC encryption obsolete within 5-7 years. 95% of enterprises have no post-quantum readiness strategy, leaving critical infrastructure exposed to harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks happening today.
solutionOverview: QuantumGuard is a post-quantum cryptography migration platform that automatically audits enterprise encryption, prioritizes vulnerabilities by risk, and auto-generates migration code to NIST-approved PQC algorithms. We do in weeks what takes security teams years.
coreProduct: Automated PQC migration platform with AI-powered vulnerability prioritization
usp: Only platform that fully automates the PQC migration workflow end-to-end, reducing enterprise migration time from 18 months to 6 weeks
patentDetails: 2 provisional patents on AI-based cryptographic vulnerability scoring (USPTO pending)
customerSegment: CISOs at Fortune 1000 financial services and government contractors
competitiveAdvantage: Automated migration vs manual consulting; 10x faster deployment; ML-based prioritization based on actual threat intelligence
partnerships: AWS Security Competency (pending), NCSC UK pilot
achievements: GCHQ National Cyber Security Centre pilot program participant, Best DeepTech Startup — RSA Conference 2026
previousInvestors: Oxford University Innovation Fund, Founders Factory
useOfFundsDetail: 50% team (4 cryptography engineers + 1 enterprise sales), 30% product R&D, 20% sales & marketing
founderEducation: PhD Cryptography, Oxford University. Published 12 peer-reviewed papers on post-quantum algorithms.
founderExperience: 8 years GCHQ cryptography researcher, led NCSC post-quantum standards working group, 2 years consulting for HSBC on quantum readiness
advisors: Prof. Oded Regev (NYU lattice cryptography), Sir Jeremy Fleming (ex-GCHQ Director), Ciaran Martin (ex-NCSC CEO)
whyFSV: FSV Capital's track record of backing deep technical founders in regulated markets makes you our first-choice lead. Your portfolio company CipherStack gives you the exact enterprise security distribution relationships we need to close our first 10 enterprise accounts. No other seed fund in Europe has this combination of technical depth and enterprise security GTM.
fsvValueAdd: Enterprise security channel partnerships, US market entry via portfolio connections, regulatory/compliance expertise

problemStatement: 70% of smallholder farmers in India lack access to formal credit because they have no verifiable financial history. Banks refuse to lend without collateral, trapping 100M farmers in a debt cycle with informal lenders at 40-80% APR.
solutionOverview: AgriLedger builds verified on-chain credit histories for farmers using IoT crop data, satellite imagery, and transaction records from agricultural input purchases. This data creates a DeFi credit score that unlocks formal credit at 12-18% APR.
coreProduct: Blockchain-based agricultural credit scoring and DeFi lending platform
usp: First platform to combine on-chain agricultural data with satellite crop monitoring to create verifiable farmer credit histories accepted by RBI-regulated NBFCs
customerSegment: Smallholder farmers with 1-10 acres, partnered through agricultural input cooperatives and FPOs
competitiveAdvantage: Only platform using on-chain + satellite data combination; RBI sandbox approval; 12 NBFC lending partners already onboarded
partnerships: State Bank of India (pilot), Mahindra Agri, 12 NBFCs, NABARD
achievements: RBI Regulatory Sandbox approved, NASSCOM Emerge50 winner, serving 12,400 farmers across Gujarat and Maharashtra
useOfFundsDetail: 40% product (mobile-first farmer app + IoT), 35% geographic expansion to 5 new states, 25% team
founderEducation: Vikram: IIM Ahmedabad MBA. Sunita: IIT Delhi CS + Stanford Blockchain.
founderExperience: Vikram: 10 years agricultural finance at NABARD, structured $200M in farm credit programs. Sunita: 5 years Consensys, built DeFi protocols deployed on Polygon.
advisors: Dr. M.S. Swaminathan Foundation (agri policy), ex-RBI Deputy Governor, Sandeep Nailwal (Polygon co-founder)
whyFSV: FSV Capital's emerging markets fintech investments and blockchain portfolio are a perfect match for AgriLedger. We need a fund that understands both regulatory complexity in India and blockchain infrastructure — FSV is uniquely positioned. Your partner network in Southeast Asia would also accelerate our Vietnam and Indonesia expansion planned for 2027.
fsvValueAdd: Regulatory navigation in India, Southeast Asia expansion connections, blockchain infrastructure expertise
